sub_modules.dct8_coeff_rom: Combinational Q14 orthonormal 8-point DCT coefficient ROM. In DCT mode it returns C[k][n]; in IDCT mode it returns the transposed coefficient C[n][k].
sub_modules.dct8_signed_mult: Combinational signed fixed-point multiplier for one sample and one cosine coefficient.
sub_modules.dct8_adder_tree: Combinational eight-input signed adder tree with sign extension to the accumulation width.
sub_modules.dct8_round_saturate: Combinational fixed-point rounding, scaling, and saturation block that converts the Q-format accumulator into the configured output width.
